query: HTTP Bearer token invalid 401 unauthorized no authorization header FastAPI optional bearer

results.title: HTTPBearer security scheme is returning 403 instead or 401 · Issue #10177 · fastapi/fastapi
results.description: fix: give correct unauthorized response on OpenID Connect Auth #9312

results.title: HTTPBearer security scheme is returning 403 instead or 401 · fastapi/fastapi · Discussion #9130
results.description: If it doesn't see an Authorization header, or the value doesn't have a Bearer token, it will respond with a 401 status code error (UNAUTHORIZED) directly.

results.title: Security Tools - FastAPI - Tiangolo.com
results.description: If you are implementing an OAuth2 authentication scheme other than the provided ones in FastAPI (based on bearer tokens), you might want to override this. Ref: https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6749 """ return HTTPException( status_code=HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED, detail="Not authenticated", headers={"WWW-Authenticate": "Bearer"}, )

results.title: HTTP 401 Unauthorized: Causes & Fixes | Authgear
results.description: tl;dr — A 401 Unauthorized means the server requires authentication and either none was provided or it was invalid (expired token, wrong API key, malformed Bearer header).

results.title: python - FastAPI - after successful login, no Authorization header received, also from Swagger and only when deployed on server - Stack Overflow
results.description: And the same API successfully works in localhost. ... Solved, the cause was a hard-to-find network setting that was dropping the auth header from http requests, totally unrelated with FastAPI.
